author: undefined
message:
#  Hello,

**I am writing on behalf of the Vietnamese player community. Today, Roblox VNG has hidden the game Emergency Hamburg, and as a result, many of us have had to use a VPN to continue accessing and playing it.

We would like to ask why this has happened. Is there a specific reason why the game is no longer available on Roblox VNG in Vietnam?

We sincerely hope that Emergency Hamburg will not be permanently removed from the Vietnam server, as many Vietnamese players enjoy and actively support the game.

Thank you for your time, and we look forward to your response.**
